note: Hand-reviewed, PII-scrubbed seed of representative business-email sentences in the style of the Enron Email Corpus. Every line was read by a human; person names, email addresses, phone numbers, and dates were replaced with [NAME], [EMAIL], [PHONE], [DATE] placeholders. Raw Enron message files are NEVER committed (see data/enron-raw/ in .gitignore). Scrubbing rules and provenance: data/PROVENANCE.md.
items: [NAME], can you forward the gas nominations for [DATE] before noon?
Per our conversation, the deal confirmation will be sent by end of day.
I have attached the revised schedule for the [DATE] trading session.
Please let me know if the counterparty agreed to the revised terms.
The risk report shows our position is within the approved limits.
Let's set up a call with [NAME] to review the pipeline capacity issue.
I am out of the office until [DATE]; please contact [NAME] for urgent items.
The contract has been routed to legal for final review and signature.
Can you confirm the volumes for the [DATE] delivery at the Henry Hub?
We need to reconcile the invoice discrepancy before the month-end close.
Thanks for the quick turnaround on the credit approval this morning.
The meeting has been moved to [DATE] at 2 p.m. in the main conference room.
Please find the updated mark-to-market figures in the attached spreadsheet.
I spoke with [NAME] and they will send the executed agreement tomorrow.
Our desk closed the position at a small gain despite the volatile market.
Let me know if you have any questions about the settlement instructions.
The forecast assumes normal weather and no unplanned plant outages.
I will be working from home on [DATE] but available by email and phone.
Please review the term sheet and send your comments back by [DATE].
The audit team requested supporting documentation for the [DATE] trades.
Can we push the deadline to [DATE]? The data is still being validated.
Attached is the summary of yesterday's power prices across all regions.
I think we should hedge the remaining exposure before the report comes out.
The new compliance policy takes effect on [DATE]; please read it carefully.
Reminder: timesheets are due by close of business this Friday.
Could you send me the contact information for the [NAME] account team?
We closed the quarter ahead of budget thanks to strong trading volumes.
The system will be down for maintenance this weekend starting [DATE].
Please approve the attached expense report so I can submit it for payment.
I have copied [NAME] who can answer the questions about transmission rights.
Let's discuss the staffing plan for the new desk at our next one-on-one.
The deal failed credit, so we will need to find an alternative counterparty.
Can you verify the wire was received before we release the product?
The presentation for the board meeting is almost final; one slide to go.
I appreciate your help getting this closed before the holiday weekend.
Please disregard my previous email; the correct figures are attached here.
We are seeing increased demand and prices are expected to rise next week.
The legal department flagged a few changes to the indemnification clause.
I will forward the confirmation as soon as the back office processes it.
Could you join the [DATE] call to walk the team through the new model?
The position limits were updated to reflect the latest risk guidelines.
Thanks again for covering my desk while I was traveling last week.
Please make sure the trade is booked in the system before the cutoff.
We received the signed master agreement from [NAME] this afternoon.
The weekly settlement report is attached for your review and sign-off.
I would like to schedule a brief review of the budget for [DATE].
Let me know a good time to connect about the open audit items.
The counterparty requested a netting agreement for future transactions.
Please escalate to [NAME] if you do not hear back from them by [DATE].
Our team will be in the [NAME] office on [DATE] for the strategy session.
The invoice was paid in full; please update your records accordingly.
I have reviewed the contract and have only minor comments to share.
Can you pull the historical prices so we can back-test the strategy?
The new hire starts on [DATE]; please help get their access set up.
Please confirm receipt of this email and the attached documents.
I am following up on the request I sent [NAME] earlier this week.
